fields.title: Cochrane Handbook for Systematic Reviews of Interventions
fields.summary: The definitive handbook for planning, conducting and reporting systematic reviews.
fields.description: The Cochrane Handbook provides internationally recognized guidance for conducting rigorous systematic reviews and evidence syntheses. It covers review methodology, bias assessment, meta-analysis, interpretation of findings and reporting standards.
fields.author: Cochrane

fields.title: PRISMA 2020 Statement
fields.summary: International reporting guideline for systematic reviews and meta-analyses.
fields.description: The PRISMA 2020 Statement improves transparency and completeness when reporting systematic reviews. It is considered the international standard for reporting evidence syntheses.
fields.author: PRISMA Group

fields.title: CONSORT 2025 Reporting Guideline
fields.summary: Reporting standard for randomized controlled trials.
fields.description: CONSORT provides a structured checklist and flow diagram to improve the transparency, completeness and reproducibility of randomized clinical trial reporting.
fields.author: CONSORT Group

fields.title: EQUATOR Network Reporting Guidelines
fields.summary: Comprehensive library of reporting guidelines for health research.
fields.description: The EQUATOR Network promotes transparent and accurate reporting of health research by providing reporting guidelines for clinical trials, observational studies, diagnostic studies and qualitative research.
fields.author: EQUATOR Network

fields.title: NIH Research Methods Resources
fields.summary: Official NIH resources covering biomedical research methods and best practices.
fields.description: A collection of educational resources supporting rigorous biomedical research, study design, reproducibility and responsible conduct of research.
fields.author: National Institutes of Health
